---
title: "Structured VLM Rationale and Staleness-Aware Slow-Fast Control for Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving"
author: "Mehmet Gorkem"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    pdf-engine: xelatex
  docx:
    toc: true
bibliography: references.bib
---

{{< include chapters/01_introduction.md >}}
{{< include chapters/02_related_work.md >}}
{{< include chapters/03_method.md >}}
{{< include chapters/04_experiments.md >}}
{{< include chapters/05_results.md >}}
{{< include chapters/06_discussion.md >}}
{{< include chapters/07_conclusion.md >}}
